tasks.prompt:
Check CVE-2026-3219 (pip vulnerability) for available fix and update issue #375.

Task: Monitor pip releases for CVE-2026-3219 security patch

Steps:
1. Check current pip version: `pip --version`
2. Check PyPI for new pip releases: https://pypi.org/project/pip/#history
3. Search for "CVE-2026-3219 pip fix patch release"
4. Check pip GitHub PR status: https://github.com/pypa/pip/pull/13870

If fix is NOT available:
- Post monitoring update to issue #375 with check date and status
- Note: "No fix available yet, continuing monthly monitoring"
- Confirm next check date (first Monday of next month)

If fix IS available:
- Post urgent notification to issue #375
- Alert user: "CVE-2026-3219 FIX AVAILABLE - pip version X.Y.Z released"
- Suggest: "Run: /implement-task security/011-monitor-cve-2026-3219-pip.md"
- Do NOT automatically implement (requires user approval)

Context:
- Issue: #375
- Task: tasks/security/011-monitor-cve-2026-3219-pip.md
- Current mitigation: --ignore-vuln flag in .github/workflows/security.yml
- Severity: MEDIUM
- Frequency: Monthly (first Monday of each month)
